notes_md:
**Tối ưu hóa** means to make something work as well as possible — faster, cheaper, smoother, or more efficient.

It’s a verb, used with systems, processes, time, costs, performance, websites, strategies, etc. It often appears in business, tech, study, and self-improvement contexts.


Close synonym: **cải thiện** (improve) — but *tối ưu hóa* sounds more technical and focused on efficiency, not just general improvement.

translation.en: We need to optimize the working process.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần ___ quy trình làm việc.

exampleSentences: Anh đang học cách tối ưu hóa thời gian làm việc mỗi ngày.
Chị muốn tối ưu hóa chi phí khi mua sắm cho gia đình.
Đội của em đã tối ưu hóa quy trình để hoàn thành dự án nhanh hơn.
notes:
Tối ưu hóa means to make something work as well as possible — faster, cheaper, smoother, or more efficient.

It’s a verb, used with systems, processes, time, costs, performance, websites, strategies, etc. It often appears in business, tech, study, and self-improvement contexts.

Close synonym: cải thiện (improve) — but tối ưu hóa sounds more technical and focused on efficiency, not just general improvement.
definition: to make something as effective or efficient as possible

definitions.vi: Sử dụng tốt nhất hoặc hiệu quả nhất một nguồn lực hoặc tình huống.
definitions.es: Hacer el mejor o más efectivo uso de un recurso o situación.
definitions.en: To make the best or most effective use of a resource or situation.

example.es: Necesitamos optimizar el flujo de trabajo.
example.vi: Chúng ta cần tối ưu hóa quy trình làm việc.
example.en: We need to optimize the workflow.

translation.en: We need to optimize the working process.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần ___ quy trình làm việc.

exampleSentencesTranslated: He is learning how to to make something as effective or efficient as possible his working time every day.
She wants to to make something as effective or efficient as possible costs when shopping for her family.
My team to make something as effective or efficient as possible the process to finish the project faster.
